Company Registration Services Across Delhi

Delhi is India's most concentrated corporate ecosystem outside Mumbai — anchored by the startup and consulting clusters in Saket, Hauz Khas, and Greater Kailash, the trading and wholesale companies headquartered around Karol Bagh, Sadar Bazar, and Chandni Chowk, the corporate office towers of Nehru Place and Connaught Place, and a fast-growing density of small business incorporations across every residential-commercial pocket of the capital. Whatever the structure — Private Limited, LLP, OPC, or Section 8 non-profit — every entity incorporated by a Delhi-based promoter falls under the jurisdiction of the Registrar of Companies, Delhi (RoC Delhi), one of the busiest ROC offices in the country.

Taxvio handles complete company formation across all 300+ areas of Delhi — from Tier-1 commercial hubs like Connaught Place, Nehru Place, and Karol Bagh, to established residential-commercial localities like Rohini, Janakpuri, and Mayur Vihar, down to outer growth corridors like Najafgarh, Dwarka, and Narela. Our MCA-registered CA team manages the complete SPICe+ incorporation process — name reservation, DIN and DSC procurement, MOA/AOA drafting, and PAN/TAN application — typically completing standard Private Limited and OPC incorporations within 7–10 working days.

Annual ROC Compliance and Corporate Maintenance for Delhi Companies

Every company and LLP registered through RoC Delhi carries recurring annual compliance obligations that continue for the entity's entire operational life — AOC-4 (financial statements) due within 30 days of AGM, MGT-7 (annual return) due within 60 days of AGM, with the AGM itself required within 6 months of financial year end. LLPs face a parallel but separate timeline: Form 11 (annual return) by May 30 and Form 8 (statement of accounts) by October 30. Given Delhi's dense concentration of small and mid-sized companies, missed ROC deadlines and the resulting additional fees and director disqualification risk are among the most common compliance issues our Delhi clients bring to us.

Taxvio's annual ROC compliance service for Delhi companies covers complete financial statement preparation, board and AGM minute drafting, AOC-4 and MGT-7 filing, DIN KYC (DIR-3 KYC) for all directors, and equivalent LLP Form 11/8 management — keeping your company's RoC Delhi record consistently ACTIVE and your directors' DINs free of disqualification risk.

Why Delhi Businesses Across Every District Choose Taxvio

Delhi's company formation activity spans a remarkable range of business models — tech and SaaS startups incorporating in South Delhi's innovation corridors, family-run trading businesses formalising decades-old proprietorships into Private Limited structures in Old Delhi's wholesale markets, single-founder consultancies opting for OPC structures across the capital, and NGOs and social enterprises pursuing Section 8 registration to access CSR and grant funding. Each segment interacts with RoC Delhi differently, and understanding the office's specific processing patterns, common name-approval objections, and documentation expectations materially speeds up incorporation and reduces resubmission cycles.

Taxvio's ROC team has filed incorporation and compliance documents with RoC Delhi for clients across nearly every Delhi district — from the Central and North Delhi wholesale belt to the South and South West Delhi startup and residential corridors. Our WhatsApp-first model means a trading firm incorporating in Sadar Bazar and a tech startup incorporating in Hauz Khas receive the exact same CA-quality, same-day response — with transparent, all-inclusive pricing and zero office visits required for any of our nine ROC services.
